meaning: 鹿儿岛[日本九州岛南岸港市]
examples: They were taken to Kagoshima,seat of the Satsuma clan.
Initial plans include importing about 10,000 black hogs from Kagoshima of Japan to the farm.
This picture was taken in January 2010, of Sakurajima volcano near Kagoshima town in south Japan.
In a separate incident, another unidentified submarine was detected traveling west of Amami-Oshima Island in Kagoshima prefecture on May 2.
In the southern city of Kagoshima they deep fry slices of the local bumper crop, sweet potato (sometimes chocolate-dipped, which admittedly elminates many of the health benefits).
